title: Various Notices
description: According to al-Wagidi: In this year the Messenger of God returned his daughter Zaynab to Abu al-`A§ b. al-Rabi'. This took place in Mulharram 536 In this year HAtib b. Abi Balta'ah came back from al-Muqawqis bringing Mariyah and her sister Shin, his female mule Duldul, his donkey Ya'fur, and sets of garments. With the two women alMuqawqis had sent a eunuch, and the latter stayed with them. Hatib had invited them to become Muslims before he arrived with them, and Mariyah and her sister did so. The Messenger of God lodged them with Umm Sulaym bt. Milhan.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 08
